lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੁ ਸੁਣਿ ਬੁਝਿ ਵਖਾਣਿ ਮਹਲਿ ਬੁਲਾਈਐ ॥੧੮॥
lines.translit: sach sun bujh vakhaan mehal bulaaeeai |18|
lines.english: Hearing, understanding and speaking Truth, one is called to the Mansion of the Lord's Presence. ||18||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ਮਃ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Salok, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਨੀਸਾਣਿ ਠਾਕ ਨ ਪਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: sachai sabad neesaan tthaak na paaeeai |
lines.english: No one blocks the way of those who are blessed with the Banner of the True Word of the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਹਿਰਾ ਅਗਨਿ ਹਿਵੈ ਘਰੁ ਬਾਧਾ ਭੋਜਨੁ ਸਾਰੁ ਕਰਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: pahiraa agan hivai ghar baadhaa bhojan saar karaaee |
lines.english: If I dressed myself in fire, and built my house of snow, and made iron my food;

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਗਲੇ ਦੂਖ ਪਾਣੀ ਕਰਿ ਪੀਵਾ ਧਰਤੀ ਹਾਕ ਚਲਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: sagale dookh paanee kar peevaa dharatee haak chalaaee |
lines.english: and if I were to drink in all pain like water, and drive the entire earth before me;

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਰਿ ਤਾਰਾਜੀ ਅੰਬਰੁ ਤੋਲੀ ਪਿਛੈ ਟੰਕੁ ਚੜਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: dhar taaraajee anbar tolee pichhai ttank charraaee |
lines.english: and if I were to place the earth upon a scale and balance it with a single copper coin;

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਤਾ ਤਾਣੁ ਹੋਵੈ ਮਨ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਕਰੀ ਭਿ ਆਖਿ ਕਰਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: etaa taan hovai man andar karee bhi aakh karaaee |
lines.english: and if I were to possess so much power within my mind that I could cause others to do my bidding-so what?

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਵਡੁ ਵਧਾ ਮਾਵਾ ਨਾਹੀ ਸਭਸੈ ਨਥਿ ਚਲਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: evadd vadhaa maavaa naahee sabhasai nath chalaaee |
lines.english: and if I were to become so great that I could not be contained, and if I were to control and lead all;

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਦਰਿ ਕਰੇ ਜਿਸੁ ਉਪਰਿ ਸਚਿ ਨਾਮਿ ਵਡਿਆਈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak nadar kare jis upar sach naam vaddiaaee |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, those upon whom the Lord casts His Glance of Grace, obtain the glorious greatness of the True Name. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇਵਡੁ ਸਾਹਿਬੁ ਤੇਵਡ ਦਾਤੀ ਦੇ ਦੇ ਕਰੇ ਰਜਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: jevadd saahib tevadd daatee de de kare rajaaee |
lines.english: As Great as our Lord and Master is, so great are His gifts. He bestows them according to His Will.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਖਣੁ ਆਖਿ ਨ ਰਜਿਆ ਸੁਨਣਿ ਨ ਰਜੇ ਕੰਨ ॥
lines.translit: aakhan aakh na rajiaa sunan na raje kan |
lines.english: The mouth is not satisfied by speaking, and the ears are not satisfied by hearing.

lines.translit: mahalaa 2 |
lines.english: Second Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਖੀ ਦੇਖਿ ਨ ਰਜੀਆ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਹਕ ਇਕ ਵੰਨ ॥
lines.translit: akhee dekh na rajeea gun gaahak ik van |
lines.english: The eyes are not satisfied by seeing-each organ seeks out one sensory quality.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੁਖਿਆ ਭੁਖ ਨ ਉਤਰੈ ਗਲੀ ਭੁਖ ਨ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: bhukhiaa bhukh na utarai galee bhukh na jaae |
lines.english: The hunger of the hungry is not appeased; by mere words, hunger is not relieved.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਭੁਖਾ ਤਾ ਰਜੈ ਜਾ ਗੁਣ ਕਹਿ ਗੁਣੀ ਸਮਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak bhukhaa taa rajai jaa gun keh gunee samaae |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, hunger is relieved only when one utters the Glorious Praises of the Praiseworthy Lord. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਿਣੁ ਸਚੇ ਸਭੁ ਕੂੜੁ ਕੂੜੁ ਕਮਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: vin sache sabh koorr koorr kamaaeeai |
lines.english: Without the True One, all are false, and all practice falsehood.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਿਣੁ ਸਚੇ ਕੂੜਿਆਰੁ ਬੰਨਿ ਚਲਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: vin sache koorriaar ban chalaaeeai |
lines.english: Without the True One, the false ones are bound and gagged and driven off.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਿਣੁ ਸਚੇ ਤਨੁ ਛਾਰੁ ਛਾਰੁ ਰਲਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: vin sache tan chhaar chhaar ralaaeeai |
lines.english: Without the True One, the body is just ashes, and it mingles again with ashes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਿਣੁ ਸਚੇ ਸਭ ਭੁਖ ਜਿ ਪੈਝੈ ਖਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: vin sache sabh bhukh ji paijhai khaaeeai |
lines.english: Without the True Ome, all food and clothes are unsatisfying.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਿਣੁ ਸਚੇ ਦਰਬਾਰੁ ਕੂੜਿ ਨ ਪਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: vin sache darabaar koorr na paaeeai |
lines.english: Without the True One, the false ones do not attain the Lord's Court.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੁ ਜਗੁ ਠਗਿਓ ਠਗਿ ਆਈਐ ਜਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: sabh jag tthagio tthag aaeeai jaaeeai |
lines.english: The whole world is deceived by deception, coming and going in reincarnation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੂੜੈ ਲਾਲਚਿ ਲਗਿ ਮਹਲੁ ਖੁਆਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: koorrai laalach lag mehal khuaaeeai |
lines.english: Attached to false attachments, the Mansion of the Lord's Presence is lost.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਨ ਮਹਿ ਤ੍ਰਿਸਨਾ ਅਗਿ ਸਬਦਿ ਬੁਝਾਈਐ ॥੧੯॥
lines.translit: tan meh trisanaa ag sabad bujhaaeeai |19|
lines.english: Within the body is the fire of desire; through the Word of the Shabad, it is quenched. ||19||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Salok, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰੁ ਸੰਤੋਖੁ ਰੁਖੁ ਧਰਮੁ ਫੁਲੁ ਫਲ ਗਿਆਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: naanak gur santokh rukh dharam ful fal giaan |
lines.english: O Nanak, the Guru is the tree of contentment, with flowers of faith, and fruits of spiritual wisdom.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਤਿ ਕੇ ਸਾਦ ਖਾਦਾ ਲਹੈ ਦਾਨਾ ਕੈ ਸਿਰਿ ਦਾਨੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: pat ke saad khaadaa lahai daanaa kai sir daan |1|
lines.english: Honor is obtained by eating this tasty dish; of all gifts, this is the greatest gift. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਸਿ ਰਸਿਆ ਹਰਿਆ ਸਦਾ ਪਕੈ ਕਰਮਿ ਧਿਆਨਿ ॥
lines.translit: ras rasiaa hariaa sadaa pakai karam dhiaan |
lines.english: Watered with the Lord's Love, it remains forever green; through the karma of good deeds and meditation, it ripens.

lines.translit: mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਤੁ ਫਲ ਰਤਨ ਲਗਹਿ ਮੁਖਿ ਭਾਖਿਤ ਹਿਰਦੈ ਰਿਦੈ ਨਿਹਾਲੁ ॥
lines.translit: tit fal ratan lageh mukh bhaakhit hiradai ridai nihaal |
lines.english: The Words from His Mouth are fruits of jewels. Within His Heart, He beholds the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਇਨੇ ਕਾ ਬਿਰਖੁ ਪਤ ਪਰਵਾਲਾ ਫੁਲ ਜਵੇਹਰ ਲਾਲ ॥
lines.translit: sueine kaa birakh pat paravaalaa ful javehar laal |
lines.english: The Guru is the tree of gold, with leaves of coral, and blossoms of jewels and rubies.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਕਰਮੁ ਹੋਵੈ ਮੁਖਿ ਮਸਤਕਿ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਹੋਵੈ ਲੇਖੁ ॥
lines.translit: naanak karam hovai mukh masatak likhiaa hovai lekh |
lines.english: O Nanak, He is obtained by those, upon whose faces and foreheads such pre-recorded destiny is written.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਠਿਸਠਿ ਤੀਰਥ ਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਚਰਣੀ ਪੂਜੈ ਸਦਾ ਵਿਸੇਖੁ ॥
lines.translit: atthisatth teerath gur kee charanee poojai sadaa visekh |
lines.english: The sixty-eight sacred shrines of pilgrimage are contained in the constant worship of the feet of the Exalted Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਵਹਿ ਦਝਹਿ ਨਾਨਕਾ ਤਰੀਐ ਕਰਮੀ ਲਗਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: paveh dajheh naanakaa tareeai karamee lag |2|
lines.english: Falling into them, one is burned, O Nanak! One is saved only by holding tight to good deeds. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੰਸੁ ਹੇਤੁ ਲੋਭੁ ਕੋਪੁ ਚਾਰੇ ਨਦੀਆ ਅਗਿ ॥
lines.translit: hans het lobh kop chaare nadeea ag |
lines.english: Cruelty, material attachment, greed and anger are the four rivers of fire.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਵਦਿਆ ਮਰੁ ਮਾਰਿ ਨ ਪਛੋਤਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: jeevadiaa mar maar na pachhotaaeeai |
lines.english: While you are alive, conquer death, and you shall have no regrets in the end.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚਿ ਨ ਧਰੇ ਪਿਆਰੁ ਧੰਧੈ ਧਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: sach na dhare piaar dhandhai dhaaeeai |
lines.english: People do not enshrine love for the Truth; they chase after worldly affairs instead.

lines.gurmukhi: ਝੂਠਾ ਇਹੁ ਸੰਸਾਰੁ ਕਿਨਿ ਸਮਝਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: jhootthaa ihu sansaar kin samajhaaeeai |
lines.english: This world is false, but only a few understand this.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਲੁ ਬੁਰਾ ਖੈ ਕਾਲੁ ਸਿਰਿ ਦੁਨੀਆਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: kaal buraa khai kaal sir duneeaeeai |
lines.english: The terrible time of death and annihilation hovers over the heads of the world.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੁਕਮੀ ਸਿਰਿ ਜੰਦਾਰੁ ਮਾਰੇ ਦਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: hukamee sir jandaar maare daaeeai |
lines.english: By the Hukam of the Lord's Command, the Messenger of Death smashes his club over their heads.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦੀ ਬੁਝਿ ਸਚਿ ਸਮਾਈਐ ॥੨੦॥
lines.translit: gur parasaadee bujh sach samaaeeai |20|
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, one comes to know the True One, and is absorbed into Him. ||20||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੁਹਤੁ ਨ ਚਸਾ ਵਿਲੰਮੁ ਭਰੀਐ ਪਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: muhat na chasaa vilam bhareeai paaeeai |
lines.english: Not a moment or an instant's delay is permitted, when one's measure of life is full.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਦੇਇ ਪਿਆਰੁ ਮੰਨਿ ਵਸਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: aape dee piaar man vasaaeeai |
lines.english: The Lord Himself gives His Love, and enshrines it within their minds.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਿ ਮੁਖਿ ਵਸਹਿ ਤਿਸੁ ਜਿਸੁ ਤੂੰ ਚਿਤਿ ਨ ਆਵਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: man mukh vaseh tis jis toon chit na aavahee |
lines.english: these bitter poisons lodge in the minds and mouths of those who do not remember You

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ਮਃ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Salok, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਮੀ ਤੁਮਾ ਵਿਸੁ ਅਕੁ ਧਤੂਰਾ ਨਿਮੁ ਫਲੁ ॥
lines.translit: tumee tumaa vis ak dhatooraa nim fal |
lines.english: Bitter melon, swallow-wort, thorn-apple and nim fruit

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਕਹੀਐ ਕਿਸੁ ਹੰਢਨਿ ਕਰਮਾ ਬਾਹਰੇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak kaheeai kis handtan karamaa baahare |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, how shall I tell them this? Without the karma of good deeds, they are only destroying themselves. ||1||

lines.translit: mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਤਿ ਪੰਖੇਰੂ ਕਿਰਤੁ ਸਾਥਿ ਕਬ ਉਤਮ ਕਬ ਨੀਚ ॥
lines.translit: mat pankheroo kirat saath kab utam kab neech |
lines.english: The intellect is a bird; on account of its actions, it is sometimes high, and sometimes low.
